summary: Completed frontend testing of Pipeline + Recap merge (iteration 228). All core features working correctly. Fixed bug where AI insights weren't displaying due to field name mismatch (insights vs ai_insights). Added created_at to API response for freshness timestamp.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline + Recap merge testing complete (iteration 228). All features verified: [1] Live Summary card with breakdown pills (2 need attention now / 2 need follow-up soon / 1 on track), biggest shift, and insight text. [2] Hero Card shows Emory University with badges (TOP PRIORITY, 2 DAYS OVERDUE, FLAGGED BY COACH). [3] Needs attention now section absorbed by hero. [4] Keep things moving section shows Florida (Next best move) and UCLA. [5] Just keep an eye shows Creighton with 'No action needed · Added'. [6] What changed recently section shows Gaining momentum (Stanford, Florida, UCLA), Cooling off (Emory), Holding steady (Creighton). [7] AI coaching insights section shows bullet points from recap. [8] /recap redirects to /pipeline correctly. [9] No duplicate priority lists. [10] No console errors. Fixed: PriorityBoard.js now reads ai_insights from recapData (was looking for 'insights'). Added created_at to momentum-recap API response for freshness timestamp.

live_summary.headline: PASS - 'You're in a good position — 2 schools need attention'
live_summary.breakdown_pills: PASS - 3 pills: '2 need attention now', '2 need a follow-up soon', '1 is on track'
live_summary.biggest_shift: PASS - 'Emory University has gone quiet (8 days)'
live_summary.insight: PASS - 'Emory University and Stanford University require action first.'

hero_card.badges: PASS - TOP PRIORITY, 2 DAYS OVERDUE, FLAGGED BY COACH

ai_insights_field_name.issue: Component was looking for recapData.insights but API returns ai_insights
ai_insights_field_name.fix: Changed to: const aiInsights = recapData?.ai_insights || recapData?.insights || [];

freshness_timestamp.issue: API response didn't include created_at for freshness timestamp
